The '''Vershyi Sharpshooter''' was a long-range [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] built by the [[Vershyi Corporation]] for military use. It was said that the Sharpshooter combined the best Vershyi had to offer in [[Scope/Legends|scope]], power output and barrels. Few rifles could compare with this model.<ref name="SWG:VS" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Vershyi Sharpshooter appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:VS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Vershyi Sharpshooter was added to the game with the release of the expansion pack [[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees|''Rage of the Wookiees'']] on [[May 5]], [[2005]].<ref name="SWG:VS" />
